report period. Only populated for Final Assignment runs.
Monthly risk scores are renormalized so that the mean national assignable FFS risk score for the beneficiary's enrollment type in that month (as indicated by the corresponding monthly enrollment flag) equals 1.0. Risk scores for different enrollment categories are renormalized separately; ESRD risk scores are renormalized to the ESRD population, disabled risk scores are renormalized to the disabled population, aged/dual risk scores are
